questionHtml: The moment of inertia of the wheel is 1.3 × 10–4 kg m2. Outline what is meant by the moment of inertia.
markschemeHtml:
an object’s resistance to change in rotational motion

OR

equivalent of mass in rotational equations

 

OWTTE

[1 mark]
